Localization.Description: The MultiPopato tool is used to escalate privileges to local administrator or System

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} connected to created pipe {object.storage.name} from address {src.ip}, after that, on behalf of the user, process {alert.context} was started on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} connected to created pipe {object.storage.name} from address {src.ip}, after that, on behalf of the user, the user {alert.context} was created on host {event_src.host}
